name: souroldgeezer-architecture
description: Reference-driven ArchiMate® architecture modeling for enterprise, solution, and application architectures. Covers Architecture IR YAML working packages, OEF XML import/export, build/extract/review/render/lookup, canonical-path drift detection, .NET™ / Bicep™ / workflow lifting, packaged Java™ layout validation, route repair, global polish, generated layout evidence, rendered PNG validation, external validation handoff, per-view readiness, render-contract disclosure, matching Claude Code subagent, and Codex skill metadata.

interface.longDescription: Build, extract, review, render, validate, repair, and look up ArchiMate® Architecture IR and OEF XML models with bundled references, layout runtime wiring, schemas, fixtures, import/export, and render validation procedures.
defaultPrompt: Review this architecture model for professional readiness.
Render this OEF model and validate the diagrams.
Extract an ArchiMate® IR and OEF architecture model from this codebase.
